message:
feat(Lib): Implement wave, tracemalloc, venv, tty, pty, zipapp, wsgiref, xmlrpc

- wave: WAV file read/write with Wave_read, Wave_write
- tracemalloc: Memory allocation tracing with Snapshot, Traceback
- venv: Virtual environment creation with EnvBuilder
- tty: Terminal I/O with setraw, setcbreak
- pty: Pseudo-terminal utilities with openpty, fork, spawn
- zipapp: Executable zip archives with create_archive, get_info
- wsgiref: WSGI reference implementation with ResponseHeaders, SimpleServer
- xmlrpc: XML-RPC client/server with ServerProxy, SimpleXMLRPCServer
